symptoms.symptom_name: Absolute inability to void for ~12 hours with painful urge
symptoms.character: constant painful urge with no voluntary output

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absolute inability to void with a painful urge is the defining feature of acute retention.
UTI causes small frequent voids, not an absolute inability to pass any urine.

symptoms.character: severe, constant, low central abdomen above the pubic bone

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Suprapubic pain from an acutely distended bladder.

symptoms.symptom_name: Continuous overflow (paradoxical) dribbling despite inability to void

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Overflow incontinence from a chronically over-full, high-pressure bladder — a trap that can be misread as passing urine.

symptoms.symptom_name: Progressive weak/hesitant stream over the past year

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Benign prostatic hyperplasia with lower urinary tract symptoms
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chronic bladder outlet obstruction is the substrate for acute-on-chronic retention.
Anticholinergic reduction of detrusor contractility is a classic precipitant of retention in men with outlet obstruction.

symptoms.symptom_name: Two missed doses of regular alpha-blocker (tamsulosin)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Withdrawal of alpha-blockade raises outlet resistance and contributes to acute retention.
Absence of fever/rigors makes an obstructed infected/prostatitic picture less likely, though it cannot be excluded without examination.

symptoms.symptom_name: Palpable, tense, dull-to-percussion suprapubic mass to the umbilicus

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A palpable, dull, tense distended bladder confirms retention — a clinician hands-on finding the AI cannot obtain; sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Benign, smooth, non-tender prostate with empty rectal vault on digital rectal examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Non-tender prostate argues against prostatitis; empty rectal vault argues against faecal impaction — a DRE the AI cannot perform; sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bedside bladder ultrasound volume exceeding 800 mL

investigation_details.investigation_name: Bedside bladder ultrasound (post-void residual / bladder volume)
investigation_details.expected_result: >800 mL retained urine confirming acute retention
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Retention volume unconfirmed; degree of distension and urgency of decompression not objectively documented.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A massively elevated bladder volume confirms retention — requires equipment the AI/patient do not operate; sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pain-driven sympathetic hypertension and tachycardia (BP 165/95, HR 115)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reactive hypertension/tachycardia from severe pain; supportive of severe distress but non-specific. Nursing-reported readings are unverified, not a clinician measurement.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Chronic outlet obstruction (weak stream) plus two precipitants (new anticholinergic, withdrawn alpha-blocker) plus absolute inability to void with overflow is the complete acute-on-chronic retention picture.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent in-person bladder decompression by urethral catheterisation
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive relief of acute retention; drains the distended bladder, relieves pain and prevents ongoing back-pressure — a procedure requiring an in-person clinician.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bedside bladder ultrasound (bladder volume / post-void residual)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms and quantifies retention at the point of in-person assessment.
Detects post-renal (obstructive) acute kidney injury from sustained retention; guides monitoring for post-obstructive diuresis after decompression.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urinalysis and urine culture (from catheter specimen)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Screens for concurrent infection once a catheter is placed; do not delay decompression to obtain it.
